meaning: 阿波罗神之巨像(公元前280年建成于罗得岛)
examples: The figure belongs to one of the colossi of the facade.
One Colossi will be able to kill a group of Marines with one sweep of its lasers.
The Colossi, like other ground units, will be able to move through shallow waters only.
The temple, with its facade of four Ramses II colossi, is one of the country's most prominent heritage sites.
